brief_notes: Strong population genetics study with well-designed simulation-empirical validation pipeline. All table cells are numeric with appropriate test statistics (KS test, Wilcoxon, permutation tests, Fisher exact), effect sizes (Cohen's d), and SDs. The context-dependent correction result (SEA vs WAF) is well-presented. The empirical IBD peaks table nicely integrates biological and genomic information. Citations are mostly plausible and specific, though the MalariaGEN reference uses Pf7 citation for what appears to be Pf6 data. Good sample size (n=2055) for the empirical analyses.
